traits.name: Charge
traits.description: Mobility allows devastating cavalry charges against exposed units

traits.name: Skirmish
traits.description: Can dart in and out of combat, attacking cavalry or exposed units

system.notes: Mobile cavalry unit under Sir Anglim. Goblinoid ancestry, light equipment, regular experience. Excellent for rapid strikes.

traits.name: Nasty in Combat
traits.description: Goblinoid cavalry unit with significant combat prowess

traits.name: Charge
traits.description: Heavy cavalry charges dealing increased damage

traits.name: Patron's Curse
traits.description: Heavy equipment causes disorientation on successful Power test

system.notes: Elite Tier II cavalry under Sir Anglim. Medium/Heavy equipment, regular experience. Nasty in combat, significantly stronger than Tier I cavalry.

traits.name: Fortification Breaker
traits.description: Specialized in breaking down siege defenses and structures

traits.name: Engineering Expertise
traits.description: Can damage fortifications and constructs effectively

traits.name: Patron's Curse
traits.description: Heavy equipment causes disorientation on successful Power test

system.notes: Specialized Tier II unit under Prelate Ellingwood. Goblinoid ancestry, medium equipment, regular experience. Excellent against fortifications and structures.

traits.name: Wreaks Havoc
traits.description: Devastating heavy assault unit that tears through enemy infantry

traits.description: Extremely high Power and Toughness deal and absorb significant damage

traits.name: Undead
traits.description: Necromantic unit immune to morale effects and certain forms of damage

traits.name: Unholy Resilience

system.notes: Tier III undead special unit under Lord Saxton (Caliga Lifebane not defeated). Undead ancestry, heavy supernatural equipment, regular experience. Only available under certain campaign conditions. Extremely durable.
